channel.title: Amanda Bradford: The World Decision Case
channel.description: A Stanford GSB-style case study exploring Amanda Bradford's decision about joining Tools for Humanity/World. An in-depth analysis of founder-to-operator transitions, compensation negotiations, and strategic decision-making in the AI era.
channel.itunes:author: Amanda Bradford Case Study
channel.itunes:summary: A comprehensive case study examining Amanda Bradford's strategic decision about joining Tools for Humanity as Head of World ID, GTM & Solutions. Explores the intersection of AI, identity verification, marketplace design, and founder psychology.

item.title: Episode 1: Amanda Bradford and the World Decision - Introduction & Background
item.description: The opening of this Stanford GSB-style case study exploring Amanda Bradford's potential transition from The League founder to Tools for Humanity executive. We examine her post-exit founder journey, marketplace thesis, and the fundamental question: "What life am I designing, and what kind of work deserves my full intensity?"
item.itunes:summary: Opening section covering Amanda Bradford's background, The League success, and her marketplace thesis heading into the World opportunity.
